match: 英格兰 vs 克罗地亚

england: Oddschecker reported England won all eight qualifying matches without conceding.
England were described across trusted previews as organised, aggressive, and deep in attacking talent.
croatia: Oddschecker reported Croatia won seven and drew one in qualifying, conceding four goals.
Croatia were repeatedly described as disciplined, technical, pragmatic, and tournament-experienced.

tactical_read: England were a clear favourite, but several sources expected a cautious or close opening-match script.
Croatia midfield experience made a low-score draw or narrow England win plausible before kickoff.
This supports keeping low-score baseline selections in the context even when England are favoured.
